purpose: Inventory of Ceerat shared contracts: protobuf packages, gRPC services, RPC methods, messages, generated Go packages, shared domain models, mapper functions, and security hooks. Builder agents should check this before adding or changing contracts.
inventory_rules: Check this inventory before creating a new proto package, message, RPC, generated client/server dependency, domain model, mapper, or security hook.
If a requested capability belongs to an existing proto package or gRPC service, extend that contract instead of creating a duplicate.
When adding a protected RPC, update KnownGRPCMethods and DefaultRolePermissions in the same change.
When adding an intentionally public RPC, update DefaultPublicMethods and document why it is public.
When adding or changing proto messages used by services/apps/agents, regenerate protobuf Go code with make proto.
Keep contracts free of persistence concerns: no GORM tags, database models, repository interfaces, or service implementation logic.
Update this inventory in the same change that adds or changes contract surfaces.

service.name: Auth
service.domain: Authentication, users, registration, token validation, profile, and password operations

service.name: CustomerService
service.domain: Customer profiles, ownership, and customer-to-user assignment

service.name: ServiceManager
service.domain: Service/product catalog, customer carts, and customer-service assignments

service.name: OrderManager
service.domain: Orders, order status, order line items, and customer self-service order flows

proto_packages.service_inventory_note: career.proto declares multiple gRPC services; this inventory repeats the proto package once per service for builder drift compatibility.

service.name: CareerProfileService
service.domain: Career companies, jobs, skill profiles, resumes, job carts, and applications

builder_checklist_before_contract_change: Check whether the desired concept already exists as a proto package, message, RPC, domain model, mapper, or security method.
Prefer extending the existing owner package when the domain already exists.
For new RPCs, add the proto method, regenerate generated Go files, update KnownGRPCMethods, update role permissions, and add tests/docs.
For public RPCs, update DefaultPublicMethods only with an explicit reason.
For new shared domain objects, add mapper functions when transport/domain conversion is needed.
Update services-repo/docs/grpc-service-inventory.json if service-visible gRPC methods change.
Update apps-repo/docs/app-surface-inventory.json if app routes or AI tools change because of the contract change.
Update this inventory in the same change.
